title: glycosmis pentaphylla var. longifolia
intro: Glycosmis pentaphylla var. longifolia, also known as the Long-leaved Glycosmis or Long-leafed Glycosmis, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Glycosmis pentaphylla var. longifolia include its potential to treat fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including a decoction, infusion, and extract, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
